name: Pasta Salad W/Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Jar marinated artichoke hearts; drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the marinade reserved from tomatoes, oil, lemon juice, and garlic in a large bowl.
2. Stir in chopped tomatoes, artichoke hearts, and cashews.
3. Add the tortellini and toss thoroughly.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Let stand for 1 hour. (Can be prepared up to 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate. Bring to room temperature before serving.)
